description: Jason AI SDR is an AI sales agent that finds prospects and runs personalized email and LinkedIn outreach to book meetings.
overview: Jason AI SDR automates outbound by drawing on a large contact database, learning your ICP, and running personalized multichannel sequences across email and LinkedIn to book meetings.
what_is: Jason AI SDR is an AI sales agent that automates outbound outreach. It uses real-time data from over a billion contacts to find ideal customers and personalizes messages across email and LinkedIn to lift response rates and save reps time.

It is strongest for lead generation and meeting booking, learning your product, strategy, and ICP, then building tailored multichannel sequences. Jason works alongside your CRM and email tools as an outreach assistant rather than a full CRM or pipeline manager.
